---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for the editor, a new template, or a new theme.
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

<!-- One sentence. "A 'columns' insert option in the floating menu" / "A theme preset for cyberpunk vibes" -->

## Why

<!-- The actual job-to-be-done. "I'm building case studies and need side-by-side comparison blocks." Don't pitch the solution, pitch the problem. -->

## What you've tried

<!-- Workarounds that don't quite work. Helps clarify the gap. -->

## Out of scope?

<!-- Tick if relevant:
- [ ] This needs a backend / server-side component (Daedalus is client-only by design)
- [ ] This adds a new dependency (the editor vendors three libs total, and that ceiling is intentional)
- [ ] This requires a build step (no build step is a hard constraint)

If any of these are ticked, this might still be a good idea — but expect a conversation about whether it fits the project's constraints before any implementation.
-->
